idea-plugin.name: ideameow
idea-plugin.description: Meow-style modal editing for IntelliJ, implementing meow-edit/meow natively: NORMAL / INSERT / MOTION / KEYPAD states, selection-first commands (mark/next/back word & symbol, line, block, find/till, visit/search), the char-thing table (, . [ ] + r s c g e w b p l v d .), digit expand with on-screen hints, grab / swap-grab / sync-grab, and a beacon approximation built on native multiple carets. Like meow in Emacs, the plugin binds no keys in code: the whole keymap (layout and SPC keypad table) lives in a bundled .ideameowrc, QWERTY by default, and ~/.ideameowrc overrides it entry by entry (.ideavimrc-style nmap / mmap / map <leader> / desc lines; bare meow command names rebind the layout itself) with a which-key popup for pending prefixes. Disable IdeaVim while using this plugin — both intercept typing.

action.description: Show the id of every performed action, for <action>(...) mappings in ~/.ideameowrc
